source_story_zh: 礼不只是礼貌，是因为它还包括仪式、角色分寸、社会秩序和自我约束。
它把礼和礼貌区别放回修身、关系、秩序和日常实践之中。
这些观念不是抽象口号，而是用来思考人怎样生活、相处和判断。
不同学派会给出不同回答，但都关心人的处境和行动选择。
如果只记住术语，人们容易忽略它在具体情境里的分寸。

en: the difference between li and politeness
the difference between li and politeness guide
vi: khác biệt giữa lễ và lịch sự
th: ความแตกต่างระหว่างหลี่กับมารยาท

zh: 礼和礼貌区别应该从哪些方面理解？
en: Why Is Li More Than Politeness?
How should learners understand the difference between li and politeness?
vi: Vì sao lễ không chỉ là lịch sự?
th: ทำไมหลี่จึงไม่ใช่แค่มารยาท?
id: Mengapa li bukan sekadar sopan santun?

bluf.zh: 礼不只是礼貌，是因为它还包括仪式、角色分寸、社会秩序和自我约束。
bluf.en: Li is more than politeness because it also includes ritual, role boundaries, social order, and self-restraint.
bluf.vi: Lễ không chỉ là lịch sự vì còn bao gồm nghi thức, chừng mực vai trò, trật tự xã hội và tự kiềm chế.
bluf.th: หลี่ไม่ใช่แค่มารยาท เพราะยังรวมพิธีกรรม ขอบเขตบทบาท ระเบียบสังคม และการควบคุมตน
bluf.id: Li bukan sekadar sopan santun karena juga mencakup ritus, batas peran, keteraturan sosial, dan pengendalian diri.

citation_notes: 第 1 句可直接回答标题问题。
正文围绕对象、背景、代表作品、形成原因、学习价值和当代理解展开。
内容保持中立学习语气，避开现实政治、民族争议、领土争议和成人性内容。

sentences.pinyin: lǐ bù zhǐ shì lǐ mào shì yīn wèi tā hái bāo kuò yí shì jué sè fēn cùn shè huì zhì xù hé zì wǒ yuē shù
sentences.content_zh: 礼不只是礼貌，是因为它还包括仪式、角色分寸、社会秩序和自我约束。
sentences.content_en: Li is more than politeness because it also includes ritual, role boundaries, social order, and self-restraint.
sentences.content_vi: Lễ không chỉ là lịch sự vì còn bao gồm nghi thức, chừng mực vai trò, trật tự xã hội và tự kiềm chế.
sentences.content_th: หลี่ไม่ใช่แค่มารยาท เพราะยังรวมพิธีกรรม ขอบเขตบทบาท ระเบียบสังคม และการควบคุมตน
sentences.content_id: Li bukan sekadar sopan santun karena juga mencakup ritus, batas peran, keteraturan sosial, dan pengendalian diri.

sentences.pinyin: tā bǎ lǐ hé lǐ mào qū bié fàng huí xiū shēn guān xì zhì xù hé rì cháng shí jiàn zhī zhōng
sentences.content_zh: 它把礼和礼貌区别放回修身、关系、秩序和日常实践之中。
sentences.content_en: It places the difference between li and politeness back into self-cultivation, relationships, order, and daily practice.
sentences.content_vi: Nó đặt khác biệt giữa lễ và lịch sự trở lại trong bối cảnh văn bản, con người và đời sống.
sentences.content_th: มันพาความแตกต่างระหว่างหลี่กับมารยาทกลับไปอยู่ในบริบทของตัวบท ผู้คน และชีวิตจริง
sentences.content_id: Ia menempatkan perbedaan li dan kesopanan kembali dalam konteks teks, manusia, dan kehidupan nyata.

sentences.pinyin: zhè xiē guān niàn bú shì chōu xiàng kǒu hào ér shì yòng lái sī kǎo rén zěn yàng shēng huó xiāng chǔ hé pàn duàn
sentences.content_zh: 这些观念不是抽象口号，而是用来思考人怎样生活、相处和判断。
sentences.content_en: These ideas are not abstract slogans; they help people think about living, relating, and judging.
sentences.content_vi: Ngôn ngữ, hình ảnh, hành động và cảm xúc cùng tạo nên kinh nghiệm có thể ghi nhớ.
sentences.content_th: ภาษา ภาพ การกระทำ และความรู้สึกร่วมกันสร้างประสบการณ์ที่จดจำได้
sentences.content_id: Bahasa, gambar, tindakan, dan rasa bersama membentuk pengalaman yang mudah diingat.

sentences.pinyin: bù tóng xué pài huì gěi chū bù tóng huí dá dàn dōu guān xīn rén de chǔ jìng hé xíng dòng xuǎn zé
sentences.content_zh: 不同学派会给出不同回答，但都关心人的处境和行动选择。
sentences.content_en: Different schools offer different answers, but all care about human situations and choices of action.
sentences.content_vi: Bề ngoài có thể ngắn gọn, nhưng bên trong thường chứa nhiều tầng phán đoán.
sentences.content_th: ภายนอกอาจสั้นกระชับ แต่ภายในมักมีการตัดสินหลายชั้น
sentences.content_id: Dari luar mungkin singkat, tetapi di dalamnya sering ada banyak lapisan penilaian.

sentences.pinyin: rú guǒ zhī jì zhù shù yǔ rén men róng yì hū lüè tā zài jù tǐ qíng jìng lǐ de fēn cùn
sentences.content_zh: 如果只记住术语，人们容易忽略它在具体情境里的分寸。
sentences.content_en: If people only remember terms, they may miss the measure needed in concrete situations.
sentences.content_vi: Nếu chỉ học tên gọi, người học dễ bỏ qua hoàn cảnh và cách sử dụng cụ thể.
sentences.content_th: หากเรียนเพียงชื่อ ผู้เรียนอาจมองข้ามบริบทและวิธีใช้ที่เฉพาะเจาะจง
sentences.content_id: Jika hanya mempelajari nama, pelajar mudah melewatkan konteks dan cara pakai yang konkret.

sentences.pinyin: yí shì hán yì yě shuō míng zhōng guó sī xiǎng cháng bǎ nèi zài xiū yǎng hé wài zài xíng wéi lián zài yì qǐ
sentences.content_zh: 仪式含义也说明，中国思想常把内在修养和外在行为连在一起。
sentences.content_en: ritual meaning also shows how Chinese thought often links inner cultivation with outward behavior.
sentences.content_vi: Điều đó cho thấy khác biệt giữa lễ và lịch sự được tạo nên bởi kinh nghiệm lịch sử và đời sống lâu dài.
sentences.content_th: สิ่งนี้แสดงว่าความแตกต่างระหว่างหลี่กับมารยาทเกิดจากประสบการณ์ทางประวัติศาสตร์และชีวิตที่ยาวนาน
sentences.content_id: Hal ini menunjukkan bahwa perbedaan li dan kesopanan dibentuk oleh pengalaman sejarah dan kehidupan yang panjang.

sentences.pinyin: jīng diǎn wén běn tōng guò wèn dá bǐ yù hé jiǎn duǎn pàn duàn bǎo cún sī xiǎng huó dòng de xiàn chǎng gǎn
sentences.content_zh: 经典文本通过问答、比喻和简短判断保存思想活动的现场感。
sentences.content_en: Classic texts preserve the live feeling of thought through questions, metaphors, and short judgments.
sentences.content_vi: Những nội dung này tiếp tục truyền qua lớp học, sách chú giải, kể chuyện và đối thoại hằng ngày.
sentences.content_th: เนื้อหาเหล่านี้ยังส่งต่อผ่านห้องเรียน หนังสืออธิบาย การเล่าเรื่อง และบทสนทนาประจำวัน
sentences.content_id: Isi seperti ini terus diwariskan melalui kelas, komentar, cerita, dan percakapan harian.

sentences.pinyin: dāng dài lǐ jiě zhè xiē guān niàn shí xū yào fàng zài lì shǐ yǔ jìng hé xiàn dài shēng huó zhī jiān lái bǐ jiào
sentences.content_zh: 当代理解这些观念时，需要放在历史语境和现代生活之间来比较。
sentences.content_en: Modern understanding should compare these ideas between historical context and present life.
sentences.content_vi: Trong đời sống hiện đại, cần hiểu nghĩa cũ rồi so sánh với tình huống mới.
sentences.content_th: ในชีวิตสมัยใหม่ ควรเข้าใจความหมายเดิมแล้วค่อยเปรียบกับสถานการณ์ใหม่
sentences.content_id: Dalam kehidupan modern, makna lama perlu dipahami lalu dibandingkan dengan keadaan baru.

sentences.pinyin: tā bǎ lǐ hé lǐ mào qū bié fàng huí xiū shēn guān xì zhì xù hé rì cháng shí jiàn zhī zhōng
sentences.content_zh: 它把礼和礼貌区别放回修身、关系、秩序和日常实践之中。
sentences.content_en: It places the difference between li and politeness back into self-cultivation, relationships, order, and daily practice.
sentences.content_vi: Nó đặt khác biệt giữa lễ và lịch sự trở lại trong bối cảnh văn bản, con người và đời sống.
sentences.content_th: มันพาความแตกต่างระหว่างหลี่กับมารยาทกลับไปอยู่ในบริบทของตัวบท ผู้คน และชีวิตจริง
sentences.content_id: Ia menempatkan perbedaan li dan kesopanan kembali dalam konteks teks, manusia, dan kehidupan nyata.

sentences.pinyin: zhè xiē guān niàn bú shì chōu xiàng kǒu hào ér shì yòng lái sī kǎo rén zěn yàng shēng huó xiāng chǔ hé pàn duàn
sentences.content_zh: 这些观念不是抽象口号，而是用来思考人怎样生活、相处和判断。
sentences.content_en: These ideas are not abstract slogans; they help people think about living, relating, and judging.
sentences.content_vi: Ngôn ngữ, hình ảnh, hành động và cảm xúc cùng tạo nên kinh nghiệm có thể ghi nhớ.
sentences.content_th: ภาษา ภาพ การกระทำ และความรู้สึกร่วมกันสร้างประสบการณ์ที่จดจำได้
sentences.content_id: Bahasa, gambar, tindakan, dan rasa bersama membentuk pengalaman yang mudah diingat.

sentences.pinyin: bù tóng xué pài huì gěi chū bù tóng huí dá dàn dōu guān xīn rén de chǔ jìng hé xíng dòng xuǎn zé
sentences.content_zh: 不同学派会给出不同回答，但都关心人的处境和行动选择。
sentences.content_en: Different schools offer different answers, but all care about human situations and choices of action.
sentences.content_vi: Bề ngoài có thể ngắn gọn, nhưng bên trong thường chứa nhiều tầng phán đoán.
sentences.content_th: ภายนอกอาจสั้นกระชับ แต่ภายในมักมีการตัดสินหลายชั้น
sentences.content_id: Dari luar mungkin singkat, tetapi di dalamnya sering ada banyak lapisan penilaian.

sentences.pinyin: rú guǒ zhī jì zhù shù yǔ rén men róng yì hū lüè tā zài jù tǐ qíng jìng lǐ de fēn cùn
sentences.content_zh: 如果只记住术语，人们容易忽略它在具体情境里的分寸。
sentences.content_en: If people only remember terms, they may miss the measure needed in concrete situations.
sentences.content_vi: Nếu chỉ học tên gọi, người học dễ bỏ qua hoàn cảnh và cách sử dụng cụ thể.
sentences.content_th: หากเรียนเพียงชื่อ ผู้เรียนอาจมองข้ามบริบทและวิธีใช้ที่เฉพาะเจาะจง
sentences.content_id: Jika hanya mempelajari nama, pelajar mudah melewatkan konteks dan cara pakai yang konkret.

sentences.pinyin: nèi wài pèi hé yě shuō míng zhōng guó sī xiǎng cháng bǎ nèi zài xiū yǎng hé wài zài xíng wéi lián zài yì qǐ
sentences.content_zh: 内外配合也说明，中国思想常把内在修养和外在行为连在一起。
sentences.content_en: inner and outer coordination also shows how Chinese thought often links inner cultivation with outward behavior.
sentences.content_vi: Điều đó cho thấy khác biệt giữa lễ và lịch sự được tạo nên bởi kinh nghiệm lịch sử và đời sống lâu dài.
sentences.content_th: สิ่งนี้แสดงว่าความแตกต่างระหว่างหลี่กับมารยาทเกิดจากประสบการณ์ทางประวัติศาสตร์และชีวิตที่ยาวนาน
sentences.content_id: Hal ini menunjukkan bahwa perbedaan li dan kesopanan dibentuk oleh pengalaman sejarah dan kehidupan yang panjang.

sentences.pinyin: jīng diǎn wén běn tōng guò wèn dá bǐ yù hé jiǎn duǎn pàn duàn bǎo cún sī xiǎng huó dòng de xiàn chǎng gǎn
sentences.content_zh: 经典文本通过问答、比喻和简短判断保存思想活动的现场感。
sentences.content_en: Classic texts preserve the live feeling of thought through questions, metaphors, and short judgments.

sentences.content_id: Isi seperti ini terus diwariskan melalui kelas, komentar, cerita, dan percakapan harian.

sentences.content_id: Ketika teks, cerita, dan praktik ditempatkan bersama, tradisi menjadi lebih mudah dipahami.
